text.title: BA Strategic Partnership Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Stance review claims 'thinking_partner' positioning but no decision_rights are listed.
antipattern.root-cause: BA writes aspirational language without negotiating actual rights.
antipattern.fix: Require ≥1 concrete decision_right with a numeric or named scope; reject vague claims.

antipattern.symptom: Partnership charter exists but only BA has signed it.
antipattern.root-cause: Sponsor never reviewed or refused to commit.
antipattern.fix: Force signed_by to include sponsor email; treat unsigned charter as draft.

antipattern.symptom: Stance from engagement-start is unchanged after a major scope pivot.
antipattern.root-cause: No review trigger fired when scope changed.
antipattern.fix: Add a review trigger on scope-change events; refresh stance within 14 days.
